content:
## GroupRank: Reranking via Reinforcement Learning

Improve ranking and reranking using group-level reinforcement learning signals, optimizing for ensemble performance rather than individual scores.

### Core Concept

Group-wise reranking paradigm driven by collaborative RL signals

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11653

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When optimizing ranking systems or need better result reranking
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: GroupRank: A Groupwise Reranking Paradigm Driven by Reinforcement Learning
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11653
